content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use two variables inside a while loop to simulate a race between two runners starting from opposite ends of a track. One runner moves forward while the other moves backward, and we display their positions until they meet or cross.

**When executed the code will show:**
```default
Runner A at: 0, Runner B at: 10
Runner A at: 1, Runner B at: 9
Runner A at: 2, Runner B at: 8
Runner A at: 3, Runner B at: 7
Runner A at: 4, Runner B at: 6
Runner A at: 5, Runner B at: 5
```
